title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: College Football Stock Watch: Why USC is Heading in Right Direction, and Alabama Isn't

items.title: Raphinha Set For Barcelona Return As Rashford Remains Out With Knee Injury

items.description: It's time to dust off those ball bags — MLB spring training has commenced!

items.title: Men's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Michigan is the new No. 1

items.title: Women's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Duke into top 10, Georgia and Minnesota debut

items.title: Star WR Hill released as Dolphins clean house
